reminder.notes:
Release v2.18.25

Location-based reminders (geofence trigger): pick a location by opening Google Maps and pasting the coordinates back (no Maps Platform API/billing needed), set a free-form radius, choose arrival / departure / both as the trigger. Behaves identically to time-based reminders once fired -- same ringing, snooze, and one-shot completion pipeline.

Also fixes a background-sync crash (SyncWorker missing getForegroundInfo override on expedited WorkManager requests).

ai-scanner.notes: Adds the in-app "Check for Updates" tile (Settings). Everything else unchanged from v1.0.0.
